items.briefing:
Business email compromise remains the top cyber threat facing organisations like ours, so staff should stay alert to unusual payment requests or emails asking you to change bank details. Separately, a phishing campaign is actively targeting universities and similar institutions, with Microsoft being the most impersonated brand used to trick people into entering their login credentials.

Watch out for fake AI tools — scammers are promoting a fraudulent Claude app through Bing ads that installs malware on your device. **Practical tip:** If you're searching for AI tools online, only download software from official websites — don't trust sponsored search results.

featured.title: Origin Energy confirms customer data breach after unauthorised access
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider confirms customer data breach, directly affecting millions of Australians.
